caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a solid dark grey background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved top featuring a small, colorful embroidered pattern along the neckline and a thin black necklace. A small lavalier microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In the lower-left corner of each scene, there is a logo consisting of a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to speak, her facial expressions shifting as she talks. While her upper body remains relatively still, she begins to use her hands to gesture, moving them upward and outward in front of her chest by the final scene to emphasize her points. The lighting is consistent across the frames, focused on the subject to separate her from the dark backdrop.
